summary: Backend regression + new preflight/rejection feature verified. All 148 pytest tests pass (9 new in test_preflight_and_rejection.py). Config constant PREFLIGHT_MARGIN_BUFFER_PCT=0.05 and timeline Event.PRECHECK_FAILED / Event.ORDER_REJECTED constants exist. Git diff scope is limited to the authorised files (main.py, server.py, execution_timeline.py, config.py, App.js) plus the new test file and an incidental sqlite DB file.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/data_store/nifty_bot.db appears in git diff — a runtime sqlite DB should ideally be gitignored to avoid noise on every run.
Frontend polling loop (up to 6×1s) blocks toast dismissal window; consider exponential backoff or aborting on unmount to prevent stale toasts if user navigates away.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_6 baseline: 148/148 backend tests green. Preflight margin check + broker rejection surfacing verified. Frontend was intentionally skipped per review request. Frozen surfaces (SMC/HTF/risk/sizer/_handle_fill/_place_protective_legs/v1.12 reconciliation) confirmed untouched via git diff.
